Marine worms on Singapore shores: photo index

worms text index worms in general Photo index of marine worms on Singapore shores

Typical worms: smooth
acorn worms, peanut worms, ribbon worms Typical worms: bristley
bristleworms

Worms that make tubes
to live in: keelworms, tubeworms Feathery worms
fanworms, phoronid worms Flatworms

*Worm species are difficult to positively identify without close examination.
On this website, they are grouped by external features for convenience of display.

These animals are NOT worms


Brittlestars
Phylum Echinodermata


Synaptid sea cucumbers
Phylum Echinodermata


Nudibranchs
and sea slugsPhylum Mollusca


Vermetid snails Phylum Mollusca


Worm eel
It’s a fish!

how to tell apart

  • bristley lifeforms
  • feathery lifeforms
  • flatworms and slugs
  • animals that live in hard tubes
  • animals that live in soft tubes
  • smooth worm-like animals
